lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, how are you doing?

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: I'm good thank you, how can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: This is our agility course, we use it to stay nimble and to keep our wits sharp. My name is Bobawu and I look after the course.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: As a friend and fellow monkey, you're free to use it anytime, but you'll need to be as nimble as a ninja first!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh great, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are there any rewards you can offer me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me how many laps I've completed?

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: I can't offer you anything for now, so I don't see much reason to count your laps either.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: Looks like you haven't completed any laps, but I'll be sure to keep track of them, when you do.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: Sure thing my friend, so far you've completed 1 lap, don't stop now!

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: Sure thing my friend, so far you've completed [number] laps, don't stop now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you offer me?

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: I can't offer you anything for now, so I don't see much reason to count your laps either.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: I see you have your own monkey friend, by completing laps here you can transform him into different monkeys!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's neat, what can he turn into?

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: I've got the list here!

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: Ahem, here we are, At 100 you'll unlock a Karamjan Monkey transformation.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: After completing 250 laps, you'll unlock a scary zombie monkey.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: With 500 laps finished, you'll get a maniacal monkey.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: At 1000 laps, you'll be able transform him into a spooky skeleton monkey,

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: 1500 laps for a little Kruk Jr monkey,

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: Finally at 2000 laps, he can transform to look like our King Awowogei.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thought, never mind.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: That's okay my friend, come back anytime.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, how do you do my fellow monkey?

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: I'm good thank you, how can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: Looks like you haven't completed any laps, but I'll be sure to keep track of them, when you do.

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: So far you've completed 1 lap, don't stop now!

lines.speaker: Bobawu
lines.text: So far you've completed [number] laps, don't stop now!
